title: Advance Care Plan
description: Make sure the people in your life know what sort of care you want, or don't want, if you can't speak for yourself.
prompt: Who would you want to speak for you?

title: Bagpipe Marathon
description: Put on your favourite bagpipe album and annoy the neighbours!

title: Become an Organ Donor
description: This has to be done BEFORE you die. Fill out the paperwork, sign the forms, donate your organs for someone else.
prompt: Don't forget to tell your family!

title: Bequest the Pets
description: Make sure your pets are looked after when you're gone. Leave them everything!
prompt: Have you thought about your pets?

title: Bucket List
description: Choose one thing from your Bucket List to do. What is it?
prompt: What's on your bucket list?

title: Bury a Time Capsule
description: Hide away a time capsule for loved ones to discover in the future.
prompt: What's in the time capsule?

title: Bury Me In...
description: Go coffin shopping. Cardboard or wood? Silk lining or flannel? Or an engraved gold sarcophagus?
prompt: Grandiose gesture or environmentally friendly?

title: Buy Lottery Tickets
description: Life is a gamble, isn't it? Maybe you'll win this time.
prompt: What will you do if you win big?

title: Cargo Plane Money Drop
description: All your money is tossed out of a plane to the city below.
prompt: Generosity or chaos?

title: Celebrate Your Heritage
description: Get together with the family and celebrate your heritage. Go through the photo albums and share stories.

title: Choose an Heir
description: Choose someone at the table to inherit everything in this shock reveal.
prompt: How much do you know about your family?

title: Confess Your Crush
description: Time to confess your undying love, it's better late than never!

title: Create a Montage
description: Use photos or videos to create a montage of your life to play at your funeral and forever more!
prompt: Are your images sorted?

title: D.I.Y. Legends
description: Do that crafty project you've always wanted to do with friends/family but never had the time.

title: Death Doula
description: All the death literacy and support on tap with your own death midwife.
prompt: Have you ever heard of a death doula?

title: Death Party
description: The best end of life party with you as the main guest!
prompt: Who do you invite? What's the dress code? What's on your playlist?

title: Deep Sea Diving
description: Dive deep into the great, blue sea. Swim with whales and cavort with creatures of the deep.

title: Delete Search History
description: They must never know. Delete it all and burn the hard drive, just to be safe.
prompt: Seriously though, do you have a digital legacy plan?

title: Design Funeral
description: Plan out your funeral right down to the music, the place and the final fanfare. Share it with your funeral director or someone who can make it happen.
prompt: How will you share your plan?

title: Dish Out Valuables
description: Collect everything in a pile and hand it out like hotcakes!
prompt: What would you give away?

title: Documents and Stuff
description: Do your loved ones know where all your documents are? Wills, car keys, bank details and more — who knows where they all are?

title: Dog Sledding
description: Get pulled along by a team of dedicated huskies.

title: Donate Body to Science
description: Save your family the cost of a funeral and benefit science at the same time.
prompt: Why would they want YOUR body?

title: Dreeeam Lusting
description: OK, so you've been given a pass 'cos you know, you're dying. Who are you hitting the sack with?
prompt: Is it someone famous, a Roman style orgy?

title: Family is Forever
description: Write a farewell letter to all your loved ones.

title: Family Tree
description: Uncover the family secrets. Take a DNA test and map your ancestry.
prompt: Any dark secrets in your family?

title: Fertility Freezing
description: Preserve your eggs or sperm for the future. You never know when someone might want them, right?
prompt: Would you ever want to be cloned?

title: Find God & Pray
description: Well, you may as well start praying and asking for forgiveness. God will forgive all your sins and maybe your financial debts too!

title: Forgiveness
description: No more excuses for hangin' on — forgive and get on with livin' and lovin' life!
prompt: Who can you forgive?

title: Free Drinks
description: Get free drinks by telling the bar staff you're dying.

title: Funeral Fashion
description: Find that perfect outfit, the one you want to be buried in.
prompt: What would you wear?

title: Get Inked
description: Go out and get a tattoo — the one you've always wanted but were scared you might grow to hate.
prompt: What is your tattoo?

title: Go Skydiving
description: Jump like there's no tomorrow! It's now or never.

title: Go Supernova
description: Spend a night under the stars with your nearest and dearest, contemplating the universe, life and everything.

title: Headstone Epitaph
description: You decide to create your own epitaph — your memory immortalised in stone.
prompt: What does it say?

title: Holiday
description: Take the holiday of a lifetime and create some memories before you kick the bucket!
prompt: Where are you going?

title: I Got Prepaid!
description: You already paid for the funeral, it's all sorted — you're welcome!
prompt: Where would you put the details so your family can find them?

title: Make Your Will
description: Decide who gets what — if anything!
prompt: Who gets what?

title: Perfect Job
description: You can finally spend a day in the best job ever. If it's a passion, it's not work, right?
prompt: What is your perfect job? Are you doing it?

title: Keep Me Alive!
description: Don't turn off the resuscitator. Do everything possible to keep me alive!
prompt: Do you have an Advanced Care Plan in case you cannot speak for yourself?

title: Last Supper
description: You organise an amazing last meal with all the things you love to eat and drink.
prompt: What would you eat, where and who with?

title: Life Drawing Model
description: Get it all off and help some aspiring artists hone their craft by illustrating your beautiful physical form.

title: Living Wake
description: Celebrate your life while you're still alive. Invite everyone to celebrate with you.
prompt: What food would you serve?

title: Make a Sexy Calendar
description: Why not show what you've got while you've got it?

title: Monument City
description: Erect a statue of you in your hometown for everyone to remember you.
prompt: Where would it stand?

title: Mushroom Time
description: Eat some shrooms and lose your fear of death. True story.

title: Share the Combination
description: Hand over the combination to your safe. Entrust your valuables and secrets.
prompt: Who is getting the combination?

title: Paint Your Own Coffin
description: Have a 'wine and paint' style party and invite everyone to paint your coffin.
prompt: Which fun photos of your life could you use as inspiration?

title: Party All the Time
description: Have a crazy 24-hour party like no other.

title: Release the Genie
description: You've got three wishes. What will they be? But here's the catch, you can't wish your death away.

title: Rodeo Bull Ride
description: Yeehaw! Git along lil' doggie, here comes the bucking bull.

title: Ambulance Ride
description: Lights and sirens for your final moments. What a way to go!

title: Ouija Board
description: Commune with the spirits to see what you're in for!
prompt: 30% of people report seeing a deceased relative just prior to death — know any such stories?

title: Best Seller
description: Write that book — everyone has at least one novel in them. The time is now!
prompt: What's your book about?

title: Superhero
description: Become a masked vigilante for an evening! Punch crime in the face.

title: Swim with Dolphins
description: Swim with dolphins before your time is up!

title: Swim with Sharks
description: It's now or never! Why not give these ocean beasties some love and hugs.

title: Take a Day Off
description: Play hooky and take the 1961 Ferrari 250 GT California Spyder for a spin.

title: Term Deposits
description: Place your money in long-term high yield investment accounts so your family can reap the benefits later.

title: To Slur or Not to Slur
description: Tell people what you really think of them. Don't hold back.
prompt: Anything you want to say?

title: Van Life
description: Go on a road trip. Pack your bags and the camping gear and make some memories.

title: Victory is Mine!
description: You get to see your favourite team or player win and go out to celebrate with them.
prompt: Do you support any teams?

title: Words of Wisdom
description: Pass on some life wisdom to your family — words to remember you by.
prompt: What's your advice?

title: You Can't Take It With You
description: Blow it all — spend your money in a lavish, fun-filled extravaganza before you depart this mortal coil.

title: You'll Be "Taken Care Of"
description: All the care you need. Someone nice will take care of you in your final days... or will they?
prompt: Who would care for you at the end?

title: Euthanasia
description: Give the instruction to relieve your suffering and have your doctor deliberately cause your death.

title: Voluntary Assisted Dying
description: You want the pain and suffering to end and seek a prescription to voluntarily self-administer your own death.

title: Shark Hugging
description: What extreme thing would you want to do before you die?
